name: Banana Cake- Ala White
recipeIngredient: 6 large Egg whites; at room temperature
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease and flour a 12-cup tube pan with a removable bottom. In a large bowl, sift together the whole-wheat flour, all-purpose flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt (if using). In a medium-sized bowl, mash the ripe bananas. Beat in the honey, granulated sugar, lemon juice, canola oil, banana liqueur, and vanilla extract until well combined. Gradually stir the liquid ingredients into the dry ingredients, mixing for about 1 minute. In another bowl, combine the egg whites and cream of tartar. Beat the egg whites with clean, dry beaters until stiff but not dry. Gently fold half of the egg whites at a time into the batter. Pour the batter into the prepared pan. Bake in the preheated oven for 50 minutes or until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean. Let cool and remove the cake from the pan. Spread Banana Cake Frosting on top of the cake.
